games.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition
games.description: Bethesda's 2011 RPG, remastered with 64-bit engine and mod support. Best Winlator candidate in its class — DXVK handles it perfectly.

games.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim VR
games.description: VR-only build. Not usable on Android without a VR HMD.

games.title: Fallout 4
games.description: Bethesda's post-apocalyptic RPG. Boston downtown is a frame killer; rural Commonwealth runs great.

games.title: Fallout: New Vegas
games.description: Obsidian's beloved Mojave RPG. 32-bit Gamebryo — older Wine works perfectly. Use NVSE.

games.title: Fallout 3
games.description: Use Tale of Two Wastelands mod with FNV for the best combined experience.

games.title: Fallout 76
games.description: Online-only, BattleEye blocks it. Don't bother on Winlator.

games.title: Starfield
games.description: Creation Engine 2. Demanding — even SD8E sits at 20-25fps. Wait for native Switch 2 / mobile ports.

games.title: Dark Souls: Remastered
games.description: DX11 remaster of the original. Smoother on Winlator than DS3.

games.title: Dark Souls: Prepare to Die Edition
games.description: Original PC port. Use DSfix for resolution. Remaster is the better path.

games.title: Dark Souls II: Scholar of the First Sin
games.description: DX11. Plays well with DXVK.

games.title: Dark Souls III
games.description: FromSoftware's third Dark Souls. Needs DXVK; EAC bypass for offline.

games.title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
games.description: FromSoft. EAC blocks online; offline patch works fine in GameNative.

games.title: Elden Ring
games.description: FromSoft's open-world Souls. EAC patch required. Limgrave 35fps, Caelid 20fps.

games.title: Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree
games.description: Land of Shadow DLC. Same engine perf profile.

games.title: Lies of P
games.description: UE4 soulslike. GameNative + Proton handles it well.

games.title: Bloodborne (via shadPS4)
games.description: Run BB via the shadPS4 PS4 emulator inside Winlator. Heavy — only viable on SD8E-tier.

games.title: Hollow Knight
games.description: Team Cherry's masterpiece. Unity — runs flawless even on weak Winlator setups.

games.title: Celeste
games.description: FNA-based. Locks 60 on anything.

games.title: Cuphead
games.description: Hand-drawn boss-rush. Tiny — perfect on weak hardware.

games.title: Cuphead: The Delicious Last Course
games.description: DLC for Cuphead. Same engine, same perf.

games.title: Hades
games.description: Supergiant's isometric roguelike. Locked 60.

games.title: Hades II
games.description: Early access sequel. Same engine path as Hades — plays well.

games.title: Dead Cells
games.description: Has a native Android port — use that instead of Winlator.

games.title: Tunic
games.description: Zelda-like with secrets. Unity — runs great.

games.title: Pizza Tower
games.description: GameMaker. Lightweight, perfect on weak Winlator setups.

games.title: Cult of the Lamb
games.description: Unity. Locked 60.

games.title: Vampire Survivors
games.description: Has Android port — use that.

games.title: Risk of Rain 2
games.description: Unity, 3D. Works in Winlator but UE5 sequel is heavier.

games.title: Terraria
games.description: XNA → FNA on modern builds. Mobile port exists too.

games.title: Stardew Valley
games.description: Has Android port — use that. Winlator works too.

games.title: Minecraft (Java Edition)
games.description: Use PojavLauncher (native Android) instead of Winlator.

games.title: Disco Elysium: The Final Cut
games.description: Has an iPad/iOS port. Winlator runs it fine.

games.title: Undertale
games.description: GameMaker. Microscopic — runs anywhere.

games.title: Deltarune
games.description: Undertale follow-up. Same GameMaker engine.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto III
games.description: Use re3 reverse-engineered binary for the best results — adds widescreen, 60fps, modern controls.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City
games.description: Use reVC binary same as GTA III.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas
games.description: Tiny by modern standards. Runs perfectly anywhere.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto IV
games.description: Infamously poorly optimised even native PC. Winlator perf varies wildly.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto V
games.description: Social Club login flaky in Winlator; offline single-player works fine.

games.title: Red Dead Redemption (PC)
games.description: Rockstar's 2024 PC port of RDR1. Stable on Winlator Cmod with the FromSoft preset.

games.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
games.description: Heavy. SD8E maxes at ~25fps. Wait for a console port.

games.title: Mafia: Definitive Edition
games.description: UE4 remake of original Mafia. GameNative handles it.

games.title: Mafia II
games.description: Older DX9. Use DXVK for stability.

games.title: Mafia III: Definitive Edition
games.description: DX11. Hangar 13 engine. Workable in Winlator with DXVK.

games.title: Need for Speed: Most Wanted (2005)
games.description: Use the DRM-free build. Locks 60.

games.title: Need for Speed: Underground 2
games.description: Classic NFS. Tiny, runs perfectly.

games.title: Need for Speed: Carbon
games.description: Older DX9 racer. Smooth on Winlator.

games.title: Need for Speed: Heat
games.description: Frostbite. Origin/EA App DRM is the hurdle.

games.title: Need for Speed: Unbound
games.description: Frostbite + EA App. Tough.

games.title: Forza Horizon 4
games.description: Delisted but if you own it, runs in GameNative + Proton-EAC.

games.title: Forza Horizon 5
games.description: Microsoft Store DRM. Tough but doable in Winlator with WP-style EAC patches.

games.title: Burnout Paradise Remastered
games.description: Locked 60 on SD8E in Winlator.

games.title: DiRT Rally 2.0
games.description: Codemasters EGO engine. Plays well in Winlator.

games.title: DOOM (2016)
games.description: id Tech 6. Use the Vulkan binary — runs astonishingly well.

games.title: DOOM Eternal
games.description: id Tech 7. Vulkan-native. Demanding but playable at 30-45fps.

games.title: DOOM: The Dark Ages
games.description: Newest DOOM. id Tech 8 + RT. Too heavy for Winlator.

games.title: Half-Life
games.description: GoldSrc. Tiny. Runs in Mobox / Winlator with stock driver.

games.title: Half-Life 2
games.description: Source engine. Use Proton-GE in GameNative for best stability.

games.title: Portal
games.description: Source engine. Runs perfectly.

games.title: Portal 2
games.description: Source engine — runs solid with DXVK.

games.title: Left 4 Dead 2
games.description: Source. Locked 60 anywhere.

games.title: Counter-Strike 2
games.description: Source 2. VAC + game itself doesn't play well with Winlator.

games.title: Team Fortress 2
games.description: Source engine, offline bots work. Online VAC has issues.

games.title: Rocket League
games.description: Epic Online Services blocks Winlator. Offline only.

games.title: League of Legends
games.description: Vanguard kernel anticheat. Impossible on Winlator.

games.title: Valorant
games.description: Vanguard. Impossible.

games.title: Fortnite
games.description: EAC blocks Winlator. Use official Android client.

games.title: Apex Legends
games.description: EAC. Native mobile version was canned. No path.

games.title: Call of Duty: Warzone
games.description: Ricochet anticheat. No.

games.title: PUBG: Battlegrounds
games.description: BattlEye blocks Winlator. Mobile port is fine.

games.title: Resident Evil 2 (Remake)
games.description: First RE Engine RE remake. Solid.

games.title: Resident Evil 3 (Remake)
games.description: RE Engine. Slightly heavier than RE2.

games.title: Resident Evil 4 (Remake)
games.description: RE Engine. Needs VK_KHR_dynamic_rendering (Turnip 24.x has it).

games.title: Resident Evil Village
games.description: Outdoors fine, indoor crowds drop.

games.title: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
games.description: First RE Engine title. Lighter than later entries.

games.title: Resident Evil 2 (Classic)
games.description: Original. Tiny — use Mobox.

games.title: Silent Hill 2 (Remake)
games.description: UE5. Brutally heavy. SD8E maxes at 20fps.

games.title: Silent Hill 3
games.description: Older DX9. Use community patches for fixes.

games.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
games.description: Use 1.32 build (DX11) — Next-Gen DX12 is unstable on Adreno.

games.title: The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings
games.description: Stable in Winlator with DXVK.

games.title: Cyberpunk 2077
games.description: Heavy. Even SD8E sits around 25fps. GameNative + low settings only.

games.title: Assassin's Creed II
games.description: DX10. Uplay DRM — use cracked or owned through Uplay launcher.

games.title: Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag
games.description: DX11. Smooth in Winlator with DXVK.

games.title: Assassin's Creed Origins
games.description: AnvilNext 2.0. CPU-heavy — Box64 dynarec is the bottleneck.

games.title: Assassin's Creed Odyssey
games.description: Switch cloud version exists. Native PC heavy on Winlator (~25fps).

games.title: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
games.description: Bigger Anvil engine. ~22fps on SD8E.

games.title: Assassin's Creed Mirage
games.description: Has native iOS port — wait for Android equivalent.

games.title: Far Cry 3
games.description: DX9/11. Stable with DXVK.

games.title: Far Cry 4
games.description: DX11. Smooth at 35-45fps.

games.title: Far Cry 5
games.description: Dunia 2. Heavier. ~28fps SD8E.

games.title: Far Cry 6
games.description: Anvil-flavoured Dunia. ~25fps SD8E.

games.title: Metro 2033 Redux
games.description: 4A Engine. Runs in Winlator with DXVK.

games.title: Metro: Last Light Redux
games.description: Same engine, similar perf.

games.title: Metro Exodus
games.description: 4A Engine + RT. Demanding. ~25fps SD8E.

games.title: BioShock Remastered
games.description: Unreal 2.5. Runs smooth in Winlator.

games.title: BioShock 2 Remastered
games.description: Similar to original. Smooth.

games.title: BioShock Infinite
games.description: UE3. Runs locked 30+. DXVK helps.

games.title: Dishonored: Definitive Edition
games.description: UE3. Locked 60 on SD8E.

games.title: Dishonored 2
games.description: Void Engine. Heavier — 30-40fps.

games.title: Hitman (2016)
games.description: Glacier 2. Stable in Winlator.

games.title: Hitman 2
games.description: Improved Glacier. Plays well.

games.title: Hitman 3 (World of Assassination)
games.description: Switch cloud version. PC runs in Winlator.

games.title: Metal Gear Solid V: The Phantom Pain
games.description: Fox Engine. Runs great. Steam DRM removable.

games.title: Metal Gear Solid V: Ground Zeroes
games.description: Prologue to TPP, same engine.

games.title: Metal Gear Solid: Master Collection Vol. 1
games.description: Includes MGS1/2/3. Switch port is also great.

games.title: Metal Gear Solid Δ: Snake Eater
games.description: UE5 remake. Too heavy.

games.title: Death Stranding
games.description: Decima. Has iOS port. Native Android in pipeline.

games.title: Death Stranding 2: On the Beach
games.description: Decima. PC port pending.

games.title: Control: Ultimate Edition
games.description: Northlight engine + RT. ~30fps SD8E with low settings.

games.title: Alan Wake Remastered
games.description: Northlight. Works in Winlator with DXVK.

games.title: Alan Wake 2
games.description: Northlight Mesh Shaders required. SD8E ~15fps.

games.title: Tomb Raider (2013)
games.description: Crystal Dynamics engine. Stable in Winlator.

games.title: Rise of the Tomb Raider
games.description: Foundation engine. ~40fps SD8E.

games.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
games.description: Same engine. ~35fps SD8E.

games.title: NieR: Automata
games.description: Notorious for resolution bugs. Install FAR mod for fix.

games.title: NieR Replicant ver.1.22…
games.description: Plays well in Winlator with DXVK.

games.title: Persona 5 Royal
games.description: Atlus's JRPG. Switch version via Eden often runs better.

games.title: Persona 4 Golden
games.description: Best handheld experience is Vita; PC port runs anywhere.

games.title: Persona 3 Reload
games.description: UE4 remake of P3. Plays well in GameNative.

games.title: Yakuza 0
games.description: Dragon Engine prequel. Locked 60 in Winlator.

games.description: Remake of Yakuza 1. Smooth.

games.description: Dragon Engine remake of Yakuza 2.

games.description: Dragon Engine. ~40fps SD8E.

games.title: Final Fantasy XIV Online

reports.notes: Slight stutter in cells with weather.
Proton handles F4 better than Wine.
30fps cap rural, drops to 22 in city.
